title: EARLY INTERVENTION/EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION - 211info
text: HIGH DESERT EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EARLY INTERVENTION/EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Contracts with local agencies to provide a statewide system of free services for young children with developmental delays and disabilities and their families, including; Early Intervention (EI): Individually designed services for children and support for parents to enhance children's physical, cognitive, communication, social emotional and/or adaptive development; and Early Childhood Special Education (ECSE): Specially designed instruction for children in the areas of communication, cognitive, social/emotional, adaptive, and others. 2804 SW 6th Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Any child 0-school age with a suspected developmental delay or disability is eligible for free screening and evaluation, children determined to have delays or disabilities are eligible for EI/ECSE services Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 312-1963 , .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 312-1963 Deschutes County, Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs Jennifer Faircloth [email protected] Main phone (541) 565-3600 Gilliam, Sherman, and Wheeler Counties Angela Thompson [email protected] Main phone (541) 573-6461 Harney County Donna Schnitker [email protected] Main phone (541) 693-5740 Jefferson County Cheryl Evan [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, Gilliam, Harney, Jefferson, Sherman, and Wheeler Counties and Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs Services: Early Identification Programs Early Intervention for Children with Disabilities/Delays Pediatric Developmental Assessment Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HIGH DESERT HOME SCHOOL OFFICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIGH DESERT EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
